title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Just Herbs

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Just Herbs
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Just Herbs! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Just Herbs:
Just Herbs is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Just Herbs!
